use_cases: Boolean settings toggles in SaaS application preferences
Feature flag switches in dev-tools interfaces
Dark/light mode toggle for theme switching
Permission and access control toggles in admin panels
Marketing opt-in/out toggles in e-commerce checkout flows
ai_summary: A customizable toggle switch component with multiple color variants (blue, red, amber, green, teal, purple, pink, gray) and size options. Features smooth transitions, disabled states, optional icons for checked/unchecked states, and flexible label positioning. Built with Tailwind CSS for consistent styling across SaaS, dev-tools, and general application settings interfaces.
